how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to send your application via email for the IIT Kanpur Project Assistant position is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Assistant role at IIT Kanpur, candidates must possess a Graduate Degree along with a minimum of 3 years of experience working in an experimental physics laboratory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant post will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 13,000 to Rs. 32,800 per month, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Kanpur Project Assistant job?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIT Kanpur Project Assistant recruitment must be submitted via email. Candidates need to prepare their application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IIT Kanpur Project Assistant recruitment. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant post announced by the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position at IIT Kanpur will primarily involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position at IIT Kanpur is a contractual job. This means the employment is for a fixed tenure as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India. The recruitment is for a position within this institute.

faq.question: Q10. Does the notification mention any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification PDF for comprehensive information regarding age limits and any applicable relaxations.
